content: I will update the vacancy card layout: make it slimmer (`p-4`), display vacancy initials instead of the briefcase icon, make the job title clickable to trigger the details/process view, append additional job details (such as contract type, localization, salary) in the subtitle line, and change the select dropdown's rounding to `rounded-[5px]`.
thinking:
**Refining UI Element Adjustments**

Okay, I'm focusing in on specific changes, and I've zeroed in on lines 3679-3712. I'm adjusting the card's padding. I am changing `p-6` to `p-4` to create a more compact, but still spacious UI element. Also, instead of the original text, I will use Initials instead!

args.Description: "Make vacancy cards slimmer, use initials icon, add metadata, clickable title, and 5px select rounding in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change card styling to p-4, map title to get initials, make title clickable, add detailed metadata in subtitle, and use rounded-[5px] on status select in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.TargetContent:
"

{job.title}

{job.created_at ? new Date(job.created_at).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR') : 'Recentemente'} • {job.modality}

{job.candidates_count || 0}

Inscritos
args.toolAction: "Updating vacancy card layouts and styles in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
